uiBuilder.label: Stat Card
uiBuilder.description: A compact stat / KPI card: a muted label over a large value, coloured by a severity variant. Optionally tints the card background. Composes now-card.

properties.name: label
properties.label: Label
properties.description: Muted label shown above the value.

properties.name: value
properties.label: Value
properties.description: The large value shown in the card.

properties.name: variant
properties.label: Severity variant
properties.description: Severity that colours the value (and, when enabled, the card tint).

properties.name: useVariantBackground
properties.label: Tint background
properties.description: When on, tints the card background with the variant's soft colour.

actions.name: STAT_CARD_CLICKED
actions.label: Stat card clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks the card.
